title: Epilog - Das Geheimnis der Orplid
writer: Robert A. Stemmle, Helmut Käutner, Artur Brauner
actors: Horst Caspar, Bettina Moissi, O.E. Hasse
plot: The journalist Peter Zabel stumbles upon the sinking of the luxury yacht Orplid in Hamburg on August 14, 1949. The ship went down with a wedding party run by artists on a pleasure trip from Hamburg to Scotland . In spite of good w...
